MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-29-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD JUNG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED TO SET ASIDE THE PREVIOUS ORDER GRANTING THE FEE WAIVER AND VACATE THIS ORDER. HAVING MR. JUNG FAILED TO APPEAR AT TODAY'S HEARING, THE COURT ON IT'S OWN MOTION RECONSIDERING THE FEE WAIVER AND VACATING ANY AND PREVIOUS FEE WAIVERS, HE SHALL PAY ANY AND ALL COURT FEES THAT WERE WAIVED OR SUFFER DISMISSAL. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Atty. Andrew H. Dai Attorney at Law Offices (415-398-8308)appear for defendant Hon Lam Yeung moving party.

Tentative ruling is adopted, Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend within 30 days to state which provision of "Commercial Lease Agreement" was breached, how it was breached, and what the damages are. Order signed in open court. Judge A James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Continued To May-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Swihart, Esq. (510-400-2600) for Clifford Jung, plaintiff and moving party / Darius T. Chan, Esq. (415-398-8308) for Hon Lam Yeung, defendant and opposing party

Mr. Swihart submits to the Court a copy of his substitution of attorney for plaintiff in open court. Both parties stipulate to mediate and requests continuation of this matter in thirty days. Court grants the motion to continue. PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD JUNG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785 is continued to Tuesday, May 28, 2013 in Dept. 501 at 9:30am. Notice is waived by both parties. Judge Anne Bouliane, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
